description_long: This is a robust, rounded bronze vase with a wide body and a short, cylindrical neck. The surface is adorned with a dark, mottled patina, suggesting age and exposure to the elements, and is accented by two horizontal bands encircling the body. On opposite sides, there are two prominent metal ring handles attached to decorative mounts, adding both functional and ornamental value. The base is slightly raised and narrower than the body, providing stability. The overall form is reminiscent of ancient ceremonial or storage vessels, with subtle geometric patterns faintly visible beneath the patina. The vase exudes a sense of historical significance and would serve as a striking decorative piece in an urban public or garden setting.
description: A heavy, rounded bronze vase with a dark patina, featuring two metal ring handles and subtle geometric patterns. Its aged surface and sturdy form evoke a sense of antiquity and durability.
description_view_0: The vase is seen from the side, showing its rounded body, short neck, and one ring handle partially visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights one of the metal ring handles and its decorative mount, with the banding and patina clearly visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the vase, showing the other ring handle and the continuous horizontal bands.
description_view_3: A similar view to view 1, focusing on the second ring handle and its mount, with the geometric patterns more apparent.
